meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no design skills (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no design skills. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template Checklist
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with UI. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship high-end SaaS projects fast. This intermediate checklist is for developers.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates design debt by providing a modular, aesthetic-first architecture. By pairing it with Claude Code, you offload the heavy lifting of UI/UX to AI. This workflow allows you to focus on business logic while generating production-ready, responsive interfaces in minutes, not days.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and your screen is staring back with a blank, unstyled void. You have the logic, you have the API, but your lack of design skills is turning a high-ticket project into a tedious slog. The gap between a functional backend and a professional SaaS product is where most freelancers lose their profit margin.

Relief has arrived. The Antigravity project template acts as your structural scaffolding, providing a pre-built, high-conversion design system that handles the heavy lifting of aesthetics. Combined with the surgical precision of Claude Code, you can now manifest complex interfaces with zero design overhead. It is time to stop guessing at CSS and start shipping at scale.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundational design system to ensure all subsequent UI components inherit professional typography and spacing patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity enterprise template with dark mode support and a clean, minimalist typography system.

steps.title: Define the Layout Architecture
steps.description: Structure your primary dashboards and landing pages using Antigravity's responsive grid system to guarantee mobile-first performance.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive dashboard layout with a sidebar, top navigation, and a main content area using Antigravity layout components.

steps.title: Generate Functional UI Modules
steps.description: Rapidly build complex forms and data tables by leveraging the template's built-in validation and state-management patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a multi-step user onboarding form with real-time validation and clean input fields consistent with the Antigravity design language.

steps.title: Inject Thematic Consistency
steps.description: Apply custom brand colors and branding tokens to the template to make the project feel bespoke without writing manual CSS.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Update the primary and secondary color tokens in the project to match a professional fintech aesthetic using the Antigravity theme config.

steps.title: Final Polish and Performance Audit
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform a final review of the generated code, ensuring accessibility compliance and optimal loading speeds.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current project for accessibility (WCAG) and performance bottlenecks, then apply necessary optimizations.

pro_tips: Keep your design tokens in a single JSON file; Claude Code can parse this to maintain visual consistency across every new component generated.
Use 'dry-run' mode in Claude Code before applying large UI changes to see exactly which files will be modified.
Leverage Antigravity's component library for complex interactions rather than building custom state machines from scratch.
Always define your brand's font-family in the Antigravity global config first; it cascades down and saves hours of style overrides.
If the AI produces generic layouts, prompt it to 'use semantic HTML5 and accessible ARIA labels' to ensure your output is enterprise-grade.
content.next_steps: Once your UI is live, integrate your authentication provider and deploy to Vercel to begin user testing.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting design limitations bottleneck your freelance revenue. By mastering the Antigravity template and Claude Code workflow, you move from a developer to a product architect. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
